'''Bresnia''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Tandon sector/Legends|Tandon sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].

==History==
Sometime after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Agent/Legends|agent]] [[Karlon]] was killed in a [[Battle of Bresnia|battle]] against [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces on Bresnia.<ref name="AJ10" />
